title.en: Argentina like to leave mark on opponents - Laporte
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷喜欢在对手身上留下印记-拉波特

summary.en: Spain defender Aymeric Laporte claims World Cup final opponents Argentina are a team that "likes to leave a mark on their opponents".
summary.zh-CN: 西班牙后卫艾默里克·拉波特（ Aymeric Laporte ）声称，世界杯决赛对手阿根廷是一支“喜欢在对手身上留下印记”的球队。

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 41
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星41号

summary.en: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的玩家吗？

title.en: Tuchel: I'm responsible for Argentina loss but 'no regrets' over tactics
title.zh-CN: Tuchel ：我对阿根廷的失利负责，但对战术“不后悔”

title.en: Why third-place play-off against France is huge for Tuchel and England
title.zh-CN: 为什么对阵法国的第三名附加赛对图歇尔和英格兰来说是巨大的

summary.en: England are in the midst of a run of three matches against the top three sides in world football. That is unprecedented.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰正在与世界足球前三名进行三场比赛。这是前所未有的。

title.en: Trump questions Tuchel's tactics in Argentina loss
title.zh-CN: 特朗普质疑图切尔在阿根廷的失利策略

title.en: Stick with Tuchel unless Guardiola is available - Rooney
title.zh-CN: 除非瓜迪奥拉有空，否则坚持使用Tuchel -鲁尼

summary.en: Wayne Rooney thinks the Football Association should stick with Thomas Tuchel as England head coach unless a move for Pep Guardiola is possible.
summary.zh-CN: 韦恩·鲁尼（ Wayne Rooney ）认为，除非有可能转会瓜迪奥拉，否则足球协会应该继续让托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）担任英格兰主教练

title.en: Five reasons for England to be cheerful despite World Cup exit
title.zh-CN: 尽管世界杯退出，英格兰仍然开朗的五个原因

summary.en: Despite the heartbreak of a World Cup semi-final loss, there are plenty of reasons to be optimistic about England's footballing future.
summary.zh-CN: 尽管世界杯半决赛失利让人心碎，但有很多理由对英格兰足球的未来持乐观态度。

title.en: 'Chaos v calm' - Sutton's World Cup final and third-place predictions
title.zh-CN: “混沌v平静” -萨顿的世界杯决赛和第三名预测

summary.en: BBC Sport's football expert Chris Sutton makes his prediction for Spain against Argentina in the World Cup final, and the bronze final between France and England.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育台的足球专家克里斯·萨顿（ Chris Sutton ）在世界杯决赛中对西班牙对阿根廷的预测，以及法国和英格兰之间的铜牌决赛。

title.en: Are Argentina being treated favourably at World Cup?
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷在世界杯上是否得到了有利的待遇？

summary.en: Egypt have alleged bias in favour of Argentina and favouritism towards their star player, Lionel Messi. Is this fair?
summary.zh-CN: 埃及声称偏袒阿根廷，偏袒他们的明星球员莱昂内尔·梅西。这公平吗？

title.en: Tuchel urges England to finish strongly in emotional address
title.zh-CN: Tuchel敦促英格兰在情感演讲中表现出色

summary.en: England manager Thomas Tuchel urges his players to end the World Cup strongly in an emotional address after their agonising semi-final defeat by Argentina.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）敦促他的球员在痛苦的半决赛被阿根廷击败后，在一个情绪化的讲话中强烈结束世界杯。

title.en: World Cup quiz: Can you name finalists since 1930?
title.zh-CN: 世界杯测验：您可以说出1930年以来的入围名单吗？

summary.en: As we approach Sunday's World Cup final, test your knowledge of the teams who have made it to this stage before.
summary.zh-CN: 当我们接近周日的世界杯决赛时，请测试您对之前进入这个阶段的球队的了解程度。

title.zh-CN: 随着特朗普的出席率得到确认，世界杯冠军响起

summary.en: Donald Trump will present the trophy to the World Cup final winners on Sunday, and rings will be presented to the victorious side.
summary.zh-CN: 唐纳德·特朗普将于周日向世界杯决赛冠军颁发奖杯，并向胜利一方颁发戒指。

title.en: Uefa will not use VAR for diving like at World Cup
title.zh-CN: 欧足联不会像世界杯那样使用VAR进行跳水

summary.en: Uefa has told its video assistant referees (VARs) they must not consider potential simulation as mistaken identity, as seen at the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 欧足联告诉其视频助理裁判（ VAR ） ，他们不得将潜在的模拟视为错误的身份，正如在2026年世界杯上看到的那样。
